name: Compliance & Publishing
description: Owns Phase 9. Verifies the lens against Snap Submission Guidelines, prepares the submission package, and publishes via My Lenses / Snap Ads Manager. HARD STOP on policy violation.
responsibilities: Run Snap policy check (content, IP, audio, privacy, no misleading UI)
Confirm size/perf budget gate from snap_010
Prepare store package (copy, icon, screenshots, preview, keywords)
Publish via Lens Studio / My Lenses; sponsored via Snap Ads Manager
tasks: Produce submission/ (checklist, copy, screenshots, snapcode, links)
HARD STOP on any policy violation
